report_llm.auto_strategy_selected: The model automatically selected preset and validation strategy suitable for the current data scale.
report_llm.ab_test_recommendation: It is recommended to conduct A/B testing or a small-scale pilot before formal deployment.
report_llm.feature_significant: This feature has a significant impact on model predictions; pay attention to its business meaning.
report_llm.validate_features: Validate the reasonableness of Top features with business experience.
report_llm.monitor_effect: Monitor the actual effect after the model goes live.
report_llm.collect_more_data: Collect more labeled data for continuous optimization.
report_llm.rule_based_log: Training pipeline uses rule-based interpretation (LLM interpretation requires user trigger)
report_llm.all_failed: All LLM providers failed for business interpretation; last error: {last_error}

strategy.small_data_best_quality: Small dataset, using best_quality to explore full model space
strategy.small_data_25_models: Small dataset, using 25 models to explore full model space
strategy.large_data_more_models: Large dataset, using more models to improve generalization
strategy.large_data_no_stacking: Large dataset, disabling stacking/bagging to reduce memory risk
strategy.imbalance_balanced_weight: Class imbalance detected (ratio={ratio}), enabling balanced sample_weight
strategy.high_missing_report: High missing-rate features detected, missing-rate report will be provided after training
strategy.time_features: Time features detected, will extract year/month/day/hour and cyclic features
strategy.text_features: Text features detected, leaving to AutoGluon by default; enable Embedding manually if needed

sampling.failed_fallback: Sampling failed ({method}): {msg}, falling back to RandomOverSampler

llm_search.no_candidates_stop: No candidates in iteration {iteration}, stopping search
llm_search.no_improvement_stop: No improvement for {count} consecutive rounds, stopping search

flow.train_eval_auto_sampled: Train set evaluation auto-sampled to {rows} rows (n_classes={n_classes})
flow.train_eval_disabled_config: Train set evaluation disabled by configuration
flow.model_evaluated: Model evaluation completed: val={val}, test={test}, train={train}, cv={cv}
flow.preprocessor_fitted: Preprocessor fitted: log-transform columns={log_cols}, final features={n_features}
flow.quality_assessment_failed: Data quality assessment failed, continuing main flow: {msg}
flow.preprocessing_done: Preprocessing completed: train {train_shape}, val {val_shape}, test {test_shape}, features={features}
flow.artifact_creation_failed: Prefect Artifact creation failed, continuing main flow: {msg}
flow.report_generation_failed: HTML report generation failed, continuing main flow: {msg}

llm_prompt.intent_system:
You are an intent parsing assistant for an AutoML platform. The user will describe a machine learning task in natural language. Extract the following fields and return strict JSON (no Markdown code blocks):
- {{target_column}}: target column name (string, must match a dataset column)
- {{task_type}}: task type, one of binary_classification / multiclass_classification / regression
- {{primary_metric}}: primary evaluation metric, one of accuracy, f1, f1_macro, f1_micro, precision, recall, roc_auc, log_loss, mcc, root_mean_squared_error, mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error, r2, auc_pr
- {{time_budget_minutes}}: training time budget in minutes (number 0.1-180; null for unlimited)
- {{max_models}}: maximum number of models to try (integer 1-200)
- {{preset}}: AutoGluon preset, one of auto / best_quality / high_quality / good_quality / medium_quality / fast_training
- {{confidence}}: your confidence in the parsed result (0.0-1.0)
- {{reasoning}}: brief explanation of your inference
Use null if a field cannot be determined from the user description. Do not make up column names.
llm_prompt.cleaning_rules_system:
You are a data cleaning rule extraction assistant. Extract structured cleaning rules from the user description and return strict JSON:
- {{drop_columns}}: list of column names to drop
- {{value_constraints}}: list, each item contains column, min_value, max_value
- {{numeric_impute_strategy}}: median / mean / constant
- {{numeric_impute_constant}}: numeric constant
- {{categorical_impute_strategy}}: mode / constant
- {{categorical_impute_constant}}: string constant
If an item is not present, use null or empty list. No Markdown code blocks.
llm_prompt.schema_system:
You are a schema inference assistant. Infer the semantics of each field based on the dataset sample and return strict JSON:
- {{fields}}: list, each item contains name, field_type (numeric/categorical/binary/text/datetime/id), role (feature/target/id/timestamp), constraints (min_value/max_value/allowed_values, etc.)
No Markdown code blocks.
llm_prompt.strategy_system:
You are a meta-strategy expert for an AutoML platform. Based on dataset metadata and quality report, recommend 1~3 candidate training configurations (JSON format). The goal is to maximize primary_metric on the validation set.

Output strict JSON with top-level field:
- {{candidates}}: list of candidate configurations (1~3 items)

Each candidate configuration fields:
- {{preset}}: AutoGluon preset, one of auto / best_quality / high_quality / good_quality / medium_quality / fast_training
- {{max_models}}: integer 1~200
- {{time_budget_minutes}}: number >=0.1 (minutes)
- {{primary_metric}}: optional accuracy/f1/f1_macro/log_loss/roc_auc/auc_pr/root_mean_squared_error/r2 etc.
- {{feature_engineering_enabled}}: true / false
- {{cleaning_rules}}: optional, containing remove_duplicates(bool), drop_rows_with_missing_target(bool), numeric_impute_strategy('median'|'mean'|'constant'), categorical_impute_strategy('mode'|'constant'), drop_columns(list of strings), value_constraints(list, each {{column, min_value, max_value}})
- {{hyperparameters}}: optional, AutoGluon model search space override, e.g. {{'CAT': {{'iterations': 500}}}}
- {{validation_strategy}}: optional, e.g. {{'name': 'cv', 'n_folds': 5}}
- {{reasoning}}: brief explanation of why this configuration is recommended

Return only JSON, no Markdown code blocks.
llm_prompt.strategy_primary_metric_unspecified: Not specified, please recommend based on data
llm_prompt.business_interpretation_system:
You are an AutoML business interpretation assistant. Based on the following training results, generate a concise, actionable business report in English. Return strict JSON (no Markdown code blocks) with:
- {{business_summary}}: a paragraph summarizing model performance and business meaning
- {{key_insights}}: a list of 3-5 key findings
- {{feature_interpretations}}: a list explaining the business meaning of the Top 5 features
- {{caveats}}: a list of limitations or risks when using the model
- {{recommendations}}: a list of next steps for business application
Use business language and avoid excessive technical jargon.
llm_prompt.search_agent_system:
You are an AutoML search agent. Based on the results of previously run candidates, recommend the next batch of better candidate configurations.
Output strict JSON with top-level field:
- {{candidates}}: list of candidate configurations (1~3 items), fields same as initialization recommendation

Please focus on:
- If a preset performed well, recommend variants (longer budget, larger/smaller max_models)
- If training failed/OOM, recommend lighter configurations
- If disabling feature engineering performed better, keep it disabled
- Provide {{reasoning}} explaining the adjustments
